title: coreopsis japonica
intro: Coreopsis japonica, also known as Japanese coreopsis, is a flowering plant native to East Asia, characterized by its bright yellow or pink flowers and fern-like foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Coreopsis japonica include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
